NOTICE TO PLAINTIFF
REPLY BRIEF IN SUPPORT OF DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFTS THE REGENTS OF THE UNIV OF CAL & LORETTA BOLDEN

LAW AND MOTION 301, DEFENDANT REGENTS OF THE UNIVERSITY OF CALIFORNIA'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT: 1ST CAUSE OF ACTION IS SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND; 3RD CAUSE OF ACTION IS SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE AS TO BOLDEN; 5TH CAUSE OF ACTION IS SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE AS TO BOTH DEFENDANTS. PLAINTIFF NEEDS TO PLEAD A STATUTORY BASIS FOR REGENTS AND REASONABLE DETAILS AS TO THE ALLEGED STATEMENTS; 6TH CAUSE OF ACTION IS OVERRULED AS TO REGENTS. FEHA IS A STATUTE; SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE AS TO BOLDEN BECAUSE SHE IS A SUPERVISOR; 8TH CAUSE OF ACTION IS SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO BOTH DEFENDANTS; SECTION 3333 IS NOT A STATUTORY BASIS; 9TH CAUSE OF ACTION IS SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO BOTH DEFENDANTS; 10TH CAUSE OF ACTION IS SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO BOTH DEFENDANTS. PLAINTIFF SHALL FILE ITS AMENDED COMPLAINT 10 DAYS FROM NOTICE OF ENTRY OF ORDER; IF PLAINTIFF ELECTS NOT TO FILE AN AMENDED COMPLAINT, DEFENDANT SHALL FILE ITS ANSWER 10 DAYS FROM NOTICE OF ENTRY OF ORDER. JUDGE: JAMES L. WARREN REPORTER: CHRISTINA PAXTON, CSR #1558

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Aug-23-2004 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
RULING:
NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING: DEFENDANT REGENTS OF THE UNIVERSITY OF CALIFORNIA'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT:
1st Cause of Action is SUSTAINED without leave to amend;
3rd Cause of Action is SUSTAINED without leave as to Bolden;
5th Cause of Action is SUSTAINED with leave as to both Defendants. Plaintiff needs to plead a statutory basis for Regents and reasonable details as to the alleged statements;
6th Cause of Action is OVERRULED as to Regents. FEHA is a statute; SUSTAINED without leave as to Bolden because she is a supervisor;
8th Cause of Action is SUSTAINED without leave to amend as to both Defendants; Section 3333 is not a statutory basis;
9th Cause of Action is SUSTAINED without leave to amend as to both Defendants;
10th Cause of Action is SUSTAINED without leave to amend as to both Defendants. Plaintiff shall file its amended complaint 10 days from notice of entry of order; if Plaintiff elects not to file an amended complaint, Defendant shall file its answer 10 days from notice of entry of order. (301/JLW/AC) Reporter: Christina Paxton, CSR #1558
